items.name: init
items.title: moduix React init
items.description: Initialize shadcn for moduix React and install the shared foundation files.

items.name: core
items.title: moduix core
items.description: Shared framework-neutral styles and utilities for moduix registry components.
items.docs: Import '@/lib/moduix/styles/style.css' once in your app entry. Optionally import '@/lib/moduix/styles/reset.css' before it.

items.name: foundation
items.title: moduix React core
items.description: React-specific icons and shared foundation dependencies for moduix React registry components.

items.name: theme-contrast
items.title: Contrast theme
items.description: High-clarity moduix tokens with stronger borders and focus states for technical interfaces.
items.docs: Import '@/lib/moduix/styles/style.css' once, then import '@/lib/moduix/presets/contrast.css'. Put data-moduix-theme="contrast" on the document root.

items.name: theme-dense
items.title: Dense theme
items.description: Compact moduix tokens with a structured blue palette for admin and data-heavy interfaces.
items.docs: Import '@/lib/moduix/styles/style.css' once, then import '@/lib/moduix/presets/dense.css'. Put data-moduix-theme="dense" on the document root.

items.name: theme-soft
items.title: Soft theme
items.description: Rounded moduix tokens with a warmer violet palette for product workflows.
items.docs: Import '@/lib/moduix/styles/style.css' once, then import '@/lib/moduix/presets/soft.css'. Put data-moduix-theme="soft" on the document root.

items.name: login-simple
items.title: Login simple
items.description: A copy-owned email and password sign-in form built with moduix React components.

items.name: sign-up
items.title: Sign up
items.description: A copy-owned account creation form built with moduix React components.

items.name: forgot-password
items.title: Forgot password
items.description: A copy-owned password reset request form built with moduix React components.

items.name: reset-password
items.title: Reset password
items.description: A copy-owned new password form built with moduix React components.

items.name: verification-code
items.title: Verification code
items.description: A copy-owned six-digit email verification form built with moduix React components.

items.name: app-header
items.title: App header
items.description: A copy-owned application header with navigation, notifications, and account actions.

items.name: mobile-drawer-navigation
items.title: Mobile drawer navigation
items.description: A copy-owned mobile navigation shell with an accessible side drawer.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data table
items.description: A copy-owned TanStack Table with search, sorting, selection, column visibility, actions, and pagination.

items.name: sidebar-dashboard
items.title: Sidebar dashboard
items.description: A copy-owned desktop dashboard shell with collapsible and resizable moduix navigation.

items.name: file-upload-manager
items.title: File upload manager
items.description: A copy-owned attachment manager with drag-and-drop, validation, removal, and clear actions.
